content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Medtronic: Technical Consultant Hampshire All Other Remote Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5973/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Southampton, Hampshire, United Kingdom <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://medtronic.com">http://medtronic.com</a> </p> <div><p>Careers that change lives start here. Medtronic is a global leader in healthcare technology with a Mission to alleviate pain, restore health, and extend life. Our 95,000 employees work across more than 150 countries to put patients first — developing innovative medical technologies that improve the lives of 72+ million patients each year. Your unique talents will help shape the future of healthcare while building a career grounded in purpose, growth, and impact.</p><h1><b>A Day in the Life</b></h1>At Medtronic we are working to improve how healthcare addresses the needs of more people, in more ways and in more places around the world. As one company, we can accelerate and advance our ability to create meaningful innovations - but we will only succeed with the right people on our team!<br><br>Your role within the Cardiac Ablation Solutions (CAS) team is to maintain and develop business with all customers in your territory by providing excellent training, education, and technical support to the customers, to ensure meeting or exceeding of targets while enhancing Medtronic’s reputation in the market. We continually strive to alleviate pain, restore health, and extend life. This role will focus on the Cryo, pulseselect and Affera products. You will need a driver's license for this position and live either in the South West or on the South Coast of the UK.<p></p><p><b>Responsibilities may include the following and other duties may be assigned:</b></p><ul><li><p>Providing technical expertise through sales presentations, product demonstrations, installation, clinical paper overviews and maintenance of company products</p></li><li><p>Planning and prioritising clinical, technical and education programmes with review and input from sales staff and other relevant functional groups</p></li><li><p>Providing procedural &amp; technical support to the clinical team in the catheterisation laboratory / operating theatre</p></li><li><p>Providing troubleshooting support to field sales force and customers on request</p></li><li><p>Organising and conducting training to customers (physicians, physiologists, and nurses) in collaboration with the sales/marketing team&nbsp;</p></li><li><p>Building strong and lasting relationships with key decision makers and those influential in the purchasing process</p></li><li><p>Supporting marketing and sales in the introduction and market release of new and innovative products and therapies through clinical review and customer engagement, ensuring smooth and successful launches</p></li></ul><p></p><p><b>Required Knowledge and Experience:</b></p><ul><li><p>Fully Trained Cardiac Physiologist with experience in Electrophysiology, IBHRE and/or BHRS EP accreditation</p></li><li><p>Knowledge and or experience of the competitive marketplace</p></li><li><p>Previous training/education experience</p></li><li><p>Ability to demonstrate flexibility and be willing to travel as required</p></li><li><p>Strong organisational skills and ability to work independently and as part of a team</p></li><li><p>Good communication and influencing skills</p></li></ul><p></p><p>&nbsp;</p><p></p><p></p><p><b>Physical Job Requirements</b><br><br>The above statements are intended to describe the general nature and level of work being performed by employees assigned to this position, but they are not an exhaustive list of all the required responsibilities and skills of this position. <br><br></p><p></p><p>‌</p><p><span><b>Recruitment Fraud Alert</b>&nbsp;</span></p><p><span>We are aware of phishing scams targeting job seekers. Please keep the following in mind:&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>Apply only through official Medtronic channels. All legitimate Medtronic recruiting communications come from approved Medtronic platforms and official @medtronic.com email addresses.&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>Medtronic will never ask for payment or sensitive personal information (such as bank account or Social Security details) during early stages of the hiring process. Any such requests are not legitimate.&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>If you receive a suspicious message claiming to be from Medtronic, do not respond, click links, or open attachments.&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>If you have any questions, concerns regarding the authenticity of a communication alleged to have been made by or on behalf of Medtronic, please contact us immediately at </span><a href="mailto:AskHR@medtronic.com"><span>AskHR@medtronic.com</span></a>.&nbsp;</p><p>‌</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p></p><p></p><h1><b>Benefits &amp; Compensation</b></h1><p><b>Medtronic offers a competitive Salary and flexible Benefits Package</b><br>A commitment to our employees lives at the core of our values. We recognize their contributions. They share in the success they help to create.<span>&nbsp; </span>We offer a wide range of benefits, resources, and competitive compensation plans designed to support you at every career and life stage.<br>&nbsp;</p><p>&nbsp;</p>Pay range / Rango salarial / Intervalo salarial /Fascia retributiva / Tranche de salaire / Gehaltsband / Salaribereik: &nbsp;United Kingdom: 43,200.00 GBP&nbsp;- 64,800.00 GBP&nbsp;|&nbsp;<p>&nbsp;</p><p></p><p></p><p></p><p></p><p></p><p></p><p></p><p></p><p></p><p></p></div> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/medtronic-technical-consultant">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/medtronic-technical-consultant</a></p> Thu, 23 Jul 2026 13:30:10 +0000 Sat, 22 Aug 2026 13:30:10 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/medtronic-technical-consultant https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/medtronic-technical-consultant Clario: Solutions Design Analyst II, eCOA Anywhere in the World All Other Remote Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5976/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Hungary Remote <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://clario.com">http://clario.com</a> </p> <div><p>Are interested in a purposeful and rewarding career oppor
